case_title: UNIFUND CCR, LLC DOING BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA VS. MARINA V GAMBLE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION CHRIS BLANTON FILED RE: DOCUMENTS IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC DOING BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA
